compiled_state.title: ui-discover SKILL.md line 581 has stale /dso:design-wireframe invocation reference
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
plugins/dso/skills/ui-discover/SKILL.md line 581 instructs agents/users to 'run /dso:design-wireframe <story-id> and it will load from cache'. design-wireframe is now a redirect stub (epic 28cb-a23a). The reference should be updated to reflect the new architecture: dso:ui-designer is dispatched by /dso:preplanning Step 6.

Anti-pattern discovered during fix-bug anti-pattern scan for c3f2-b72c (same root cause: Multi-File State De-sync from epic 28cb-a23a conversion).
